testcase.name: test_org_default_active

failure.message: AssertionError: New org should be active by default. Got: None assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e615acc00>('active') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e615acc00> = {'_id': '69978774dbe86e3ac84559b3', 'account_type': 'organization', 'address': None, 'admin_email': 'test-toggle@example.com', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_toggles.py:63: in test_org_default_active assert org.get('active') == True, f"New org should be active by default. Got: {org.get('active')}" E AssertionError: New org should be active by default. Got: None E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e615acc00>('active') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e615acc00> = {'_id': '69978774dbe86e3ac84559b3', 'account_type': 'organization', 'address': None, 'admin_email': 'test-toggle@example.com', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_store_default_active

failure.message: AssertionError: New store should be active by default. Got: None assert None == True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e6144ac00>('active') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e6144ac00> = {'_id': '69978774dbe86e3ac84559b4', 'address': None, 'city': 'Test City', 'country': 'US', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_toggles.py:104: in test_store_default_active assert store.get('active') == True, f"New store should be active by default. Got: {store.get('active')}" E AssertionError: New store should be active by default. Got: None E assert None == True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e6144ac00>('active') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe3e6144ac00> = {'_id': '69978774dbe86e3ac84559b4', 'address': None, 'city': 'Test City', 'country': 'US', ...}.get
